points.title: Points
points.pointsSystemDescription: Make every purchase count! Earn points and unlock rewards with every order and interaction in our loyalty program.
points.loyaltyIntro: Earn and redeem points in our loyalty program for rewards, exclusive perks, and discounts on future purchases.

pointsSpec.title: Points Specification:
pointsSpec.exclusionRule: Points cannot be redeemed for shipping costs or artwork creation fees.
pointsSpec.expiryRule: Earned points expire one year later, at the end of that month.
pointsSpec.deductionRule: Points closest to expiration are used first when redeeming.

points.questDescription: Take on quests, earn points, and unlock awesome rewards!
points.historyDescription: Track every point you’ve earned or used in the loyalty program.
points.nextTierRequirementSuffix: away from unlocking the next loyalty level.

stickerExplorer.name: Sticker Explorer
stickerExplorer.description: Explore our collection and find 10 sticker products you’ll love!

mysteryHunter.name: Mystery Hunter
mysteryHunter.description: Find hidden sticker icons on the site.
mysteryHunter.reward: Earn 10% discount on your next order.

speedyCheckout.name: Speedy Checkout
speedyCheckout.description: Place your order in under 3 minutes with our fast, easy checkout.
speedyCheckout.reward: Enjoy free express shipping on your current order!

threesACharm.name: Three’s a Charm
threesACharm.description: Mix and match 3 different sticker styles in a single order!
threesACharm.reward: Get a 15% discount on the total bill.

socialSharing.name: Social Sharing
socialSharing.description: Share your ticket design on social media and earn points!
socialSharing.reward: 10% off your next order and 3 points.

reviewMaster.name: Review Master
reviewMaster.description: Leave a review for any product you’ve purchased and earn points!

shareYourCreativity.name: Share Your Creativity
shareYourCreativity.description: Show off your stickers online and don’t forget to tag us!

theRoyalReferral.name: The Royal Referral
theRoyalReferral.description: Invite a friend to shop with us and reward yourself when they make their first order!
theRoyalReferral.reward: Get 10 points and a 5원  discount on your next purchase.

frequentBuyer.name: Frequent Buyer
frequentBuyer.reward: Get 10% off your next order plus free express shipping!

sticktasticAnniversary.name: Sticktastic Anniversary
sticktasticAnniversary.description: Cheers to 1 year with us—thanks for being a valued customer!
sticktasticAnniversary.reward: Earn 25 points as our way of saying thanks!

bigSpenderBonus.name: Big Spender Bonus
bigSpenderBonus.description: Make a purchase of 288,499원 or more in one order and unlock rewards!
bigSpenderBonus.reward: Earn 20원  discount for your next purchase and earn 20 points.

data.earn4PointsJustByRegisteringYourAccount: Earn 4 points just by registering your account.
data.earn8PointsAsRewardForReachingThisTier: Earn 8 points as reward for reaching this tier.
data.earn12PointsAsRewardForReachingThisTier: Earn 12 points as reward for reaching this tier.
data.earn16PointsAsRewardForReachingThisTier: Earn 16 points as reward for reaching this tier.
data.discount10NextOrderOneTime: 10% Off Discount on next order (1-Time Use)
data.discount15NextOrderOneTime: 15% Off Discount on next order (1-Time Use)
